title: YTEntityMoney
description: A plugin that rewards players with money for killing entities!
body:
A plugin that rewards players with money based on the amount of damage they dealt to an entity. The reward is calculated by multiplying the entity's dropped XP by the damage the player inflicted with their final hit, and then by a configurable multiplication rate.

Requirements:EssentialsX
Built For:EssentialsX

Commands: /multiplyamount
Usage Example: /multiplyamount 1 Also 1 is the default multiply ammount. Or you can config this ammount from the Config.yml that it will generate.
